title: Junior Knowledge Management Specialist
description: Support documentation, metadata quality, taxonomy work, and internal knowledge base improvements. Python basics are helpful.

title: Data Quality Analyst
description: Review datasets, document quality issues, improve CSV and JSON workflows, and work with SQL-based reporting.

title: Technical Documentation Assistant
description: Maintain technical documentation, structure product information, write markdown notes, and support internal review workflows.

title: Content Operations Coordinator
description: Coordinate content updates, improve knowledge base entries, classify information, and maintain editorial metadata.

title: Metadata and Taxonomy Assistant
description: Support metadata cleanup, taxonomy maintenance, classification rules, and documentation of cataloging decisions.

title: Application Support Specialist
description: Handle user questions, document recurring issues, maintain support knowledge base articles, and work with ticket data.

title: Senior Fullstack Developer
description: Senior role for a fullstack developer with 5+ years of experience in TypeScript, cloud systems, and team leadership.

title: Sales Development Representative
description: Sales role focused on outbound acquisition, phone calls, pipeline generation, and commission-based targets.
